visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a black beret and a dark, semi-sheer layered top, stands in a brightly lit warehouse-style supermarket. She is positioned in front of towering shelves stocked with numerous gold and red boxes of 'Great Day' scallop chicken essence porridge. She points at the products and speaks directly to the camera with expressive facial gestures. The background displays industrial shelving and various bulk-packaged goods typical of a wholesale store. (2) The scene transitions to a brightly lit indoor living room setting. The same woman in the beret is joined by another woman wearing a black and white patterned bucket hat. They are seated at a grey marble-textured table, holding up a product box and a smaller white individual serving pouch to the camera. The lighting is warm and domestic, with a blurred background showing home furniture. (3) The camera shows close-up shots of white, creamy porridge in a clear glass bowl, with visible rice grains and small pieces of scallop. The two women are then seen using metal spoons to taste the porridge from the bowl. They look at each other and the camera, nodding and gesturing with their hands as they discuss the flavor. Colorful graphic text overlays appear frequently around them to emphasize their reactions.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: Costco Wholesale. [Subtitle]: 等一下你的手. (2) [Variety]: 可以遠離這個東西嗎?. [Subtitle]: 可以遠離這個東西嗎?. (3) [Subtitle]: 這東西要999. (4) [Subtitle]: 我實在是有點買不下去. (5) [Subtitle]: 不過它裡面有滴雞精跟一整顆干貝. (6) [Subtitle]: 聽說是因為這樣所以很貴. [Variety]: 很貴耶!!. (7) [Subtitle]: 俗話說得好東西補錢包就不補. [Variety]: 東西補錢包就不補. (8) [Subtitle]: 羊毛出在羊身上我不想當那肥羊. (9) [Subtitle]: 你剛剛說羊毛出在豬身上然後指著我. (10) [Subtitle]: 沒有不是. (11) [Subtitle]: 他這東西那麼補我們兩個需要補嗎. (12) [Subtitle]: 試試看囉這個送禮也很棒哎. (13) [Subtitle]: 我覺得我現在已快生病了. [Variety]: 已快生病了. (14) [Subtitle]: 拿一包說哎你吃營養一點. (15) [Subtitle]: 我付完這可能要生病. (16) [Subtitle]: 他想吃自己去買. (17) [Subtitle]: 好吧勇敢的妹妹我們現在來試一試. (18) [Subtitle]: 幫大家試吃看看. (19) [Subtitle]: 滴雞精干貝粥. (20) [Subtitle]: 它裡面是9袋入可以常溫的保存. (21) [Subtitle]: 我們加熱以後大概是半碗的量. (22) [Subtitle]: 它可以用微波加熱3分鐘或者是隔水加熱. (23) [Subtitle]: 亦或者是你拿來滾粥. (24) [Subtitle]: 可是我們吃完的心得是. (25) [Subtitle]: 雞精味道比較淡然後它的干貝味道比較明顯. (26) [Subtitle]: 然後干貝就這樣小小的貝柱在裡面. (27) [Subtitle]: 但是吃起來呢就是非常的淡雅. [Variety]: 非常淡雅. (28) [Subtitle]: 不會說很補的感受. (29) [Subtitle]: 主要的味道是那個干貝風乾的味道. (30) [Subtitle]: 比較沒有雞香可是就是淡淡的. (31) [Subtitle]: 就是送禮比較適合一點點. (32) [Subtitle]: 它比較送禮自用就比較. (33) [Subtitle]: 我比較喜歡芋頭西米露啦. (34) [Subtitle]: 他芋頭西米露很厲害.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female presenters appearing throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman wears a black beret, a black sheer top, and jeans. The other wears a black and white patterned bucket hat and a white tank top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: First scene is a Costco warehouse with orange industrial shelves and bulk goods. Second scene is a home interior with a marble table and a sofa in the background.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched female voice speaks Mandarin rapidly with an enthusiastic tone, discussing the price of the product. The background music is an upbeat, acoustic-pop track featuring a bright guitar melody and a steady drum beat. A quick 'whoosh' sound effect transition plays as the scene shifts. (2) Two female voices engage in an interactive dialogue, describing the ingredients of the scallop chicken essence porridge. A sharp 'ding' sound effect is heard when a variety-style text box flashes on the screen. The voices are clear with a high signal-to-noise ratio, suggesting a controlled indoor environment. (3) The speakers continue to provide a flavor review, with occasional interjections from an off-camera male voice. The background music remains constant at a lower volume. A light 'pop' SFX accompanies new text appearing at the bottom of the frame. The overall acoustic delivery is lively and conversational, maintaining a positive emotional valence.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Product Hook -> Location Context -> Product Features -> Tasting & Review
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To review a high-end food product (Great Day Scallop Chicken Essence Porridge) available at Costco, highlighting its price, premium ingredients, and subtle taste profile for a health-conscious audience.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of the product, testing its contents, and naming the brand 'Great Day'.

high_inference.freeDescribe: Social media-style edit with heavy text use and fast pacing to maintain engagement.
